items.scenario: You signed up for a Saturday wildlife photography workshop at the Westbrook Nature Center, but the confirmation email left out the start time, recommended camera settings, and whether tripods will be provided. The workshop is in three days.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Whitcombe. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the missing information about the workshop
Ask whether participants need to bring their own tripods
Suggest a way to share the missing details with all registered participants
items.subject: Missing details for Saturday's photography workshop

items.scenario: You are a sophomore enrolled in an introductory linguistics course. After the second lecture you realized the readings assume a background in phonetics you have never studied, and the next quiz is in four days. You want clearer guidance before falling behind.
items.direction: Write an email to Dr. Halloran. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe your difficulty with the phonetics background in the readings
Ask whether supplementary materials are available for students new to the topic
Request a brief office-hour meeting before Friday's quiz
items.subject: Background gap in phonetics ahead of Friday's quiz

items.scenario: You ordered a refurbished bluetooth speaker from an online electronics retailer last week. The speaker arrived with a cracked grille on the back, and the bass distorts at moderate volume. The retailer offers a thirty-day return window.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Sullivan. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the damage and the bass distortion you noticed
Request a full refund or a tested replacement unit
Ask about a return shipping label and the expected processing time
items.subject: Cracked grille and distortion on order BS-30471

items.scenario: Your friend Priya invited you to join a four-day camping trip at Maple Ridge State Park next month. You can drive up for the first two days but must return early to help your sister move into a new apartment that Wednesday evening.
items.direction: Write an email to Priya. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain that you can only join for the first two days of the trip
Suggest carpooling arrangements that account for your earlier departure
Offer to help with group meals or supplies during the days you are there
items.subject: Camping plan and early return Wednesday
